2605.13438.title: Cognifold: Always-On Proactive Memory via Cognitive Folding
2605.13438.paper_summary: Existing agent memory remains predominantly reactive and retrieval-based, lacking the capacity to autonomously organize experience into persistent cognitive structure. Toward genuinely autonomous agents, we introduce Cognifold, a brain-inspired "always-on" agent memory designed for the next generation of proactive assistants. CogniFold continuously folds fragmented event streams into self-emerging cognitive structures, bootstrapping progressively higher-level cognition from incoming events and accumulated knowledge. We ground this by extending Complementary Learning Systems (CLS) theory from two layers (hippocampus, neocortex) to three, adding a prefrontal intent layer. Emulating the prefrontal cortex as the locus of intentional control and decision-making, CogniFold achieves this through graph-topology self-organization: cognitive structures proactively assemble under the stream, merge when semantically similar, decay when stale, relink through associative recall, and surface intents when concept-cluster density crosses a threshold. We evaluate structural formation using CogEval-Bench, demonstrating that CogniFold uniquely produces memory structures that match cognitive expectations and concept emergence. Furthermore, across 7 broad-coverage benchmarks spanning five cognitive domains, we validate that CogniFold simultaneously performs robustly on conventional memory benchmarks.
2605.13438.paper_summary_zh: 現有的代理記憶主要是反應性和基於檢索的，缺乏自主組織經驗成為持續認知結構的能力。為了實現真正自主的代理，我們推出了Cognifold，一種受大腦啟發的「隨時開啟」代理記憶，旨在為下一代主動助手服務。CogniFold不斷將碎片化的事件流摺疊成自我出現的認知結構，從進來的事件和累積的知識中逐步引導更高層次的認知。我們通過將互補學習系統（CLS）理論從兩層（海馬體、新皮層）擴展到三層，增加一個前額意圖層來支持這一點。模擬前額皮層作為意圖控制和決策的中心，CogniFold通過圖拓撲自我組織來實現這一點：認知結構在事件流下主動組裝，當語義相似時合併，當過時時衰退，通過聯想回憶重新連接，並在概念群集密度超過閾值時顯現意圖。我們使用CogEval-Bench評估結構形成，證明CogniFold獨特地產生與認知預期和概念出現相匹配的記憶結構。此外，在涵蓋五個認知領域的七個廣泛覆蓋基準測試中，我們驗證了CogniFold在傳統記憶基準上同時表現出色。
2605.13438.author: Suli Wang et.al.
2605.13438.authors: Suli Wang, Yiqun Duan, Yu Deng, Rundong Zhao, Dai Shi, Xinliang Zhou
